brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate with Russian strikes on Kyiv and US-Iran exchanges, while Victoria unveils social media 'demasking' laws and the Tate brothers are arrested. In research, studies explore AI coding agent vulnerabilities and multimodal LLM visualization literacy.
news_summary: Russia pounded Kyiv with dozens of missiles, the US and Iran traded strikes, and Victoria announced new powers to unmask anonymous social media users accused of vilification. The Tate brothers were arrested in Miami on UK sex crime charges, and the World Cup final features Argentina vs Spain.
papers_summary: Papers cover AI coding agent security risks from setup instructions, multimodal LLM benchmarking for scientific visualization, and human-robot juggling planning. Other studies analyze noun complexity in L2 writing and ChatGPT's effect on rhetorical moves in personal statements.

en.brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate with Russian strikes on Kyiv and US-Iran exchanges, while Victoria unveils social media 'demasking' laws and the Tate brothers are arrested. In research, studies explore AI coding agent vulnerabilities and multimodal LLM visualization literacy.
en.news_summary: Russia pounded Kyiv with dozens of missiles, the US and Iran traded strikes, and Victoria announced new powers to unmask anonymous social media users accused of vilification. The Tate brothers were arrested in Miami on UK sex crime charges, and the World Cup final features Argentina vs Spain.
en.papers_summary: Papers cover AI coding agent security risks from setup instructions, multimodal LLM benchmarking for scientific visualization, and human-robot juggling planning. Other studies analyze noun complexity in L2 writing and ChatGPT's effect on rhetorical moves in personal statements.

zh.brief: 今日焦点：朝鲜人秘密接触K-pop，欧洲热浪推高中国空调需求，世界杯金靴之争白热化，以及首次发现宜居带岩质行星拥有大气层。
zh.news_summary: 脱北者透露K-pop突破封锁进入朝鲜；欧洲热浪驱动中国空调销量激增；姆巴佩金靴领先但梅西有望在决赛反超；天文学家发现类地行星在宜居带内拥有大气层。
zh.papers_summary: 研究关注二语写作教师的专业身份、儿童写作中的模态互动、ChatGPT对修辞步骤的影响，以及城市驾驶数据的因果分析。

todays_image.caption: As a drone strips away anonymity from above, Victoria's new law strips away the mask of anonymous online haters below.
todays_image.title: General Atomics MQ-1L Predator A
